description: BoreDiameterFromBottom optimization on SamplePVC-Whistle (1D Brent). Tests bore diameter ratio optimization from bottom upward with auto-detected boundary via getTopOfBody()+1.
notes: SamplePVC-Whistle has 3 bore points. getTopOfBody() returns 1 (no named bore points; falls back to lowest bore point above topmost hole). n_unchanged = 1+1 = 2, n_dims = 3-2 = 1 → Brent optimizer. Bounds: [0.5, 1.0] (diameter ratio, dimensionless).
